name: Apollo.io
oneLiner: Sales intelligence and engagement platform with a massive B2B contact database.
description: Apollo.io provides a REST API that gives developers programmatic access to over 275 million verified contacts and 60 million companies. Build prospecting workflows, enrich leads in real time, and sync data directly into your CRM. The API supports advanced search filters, email sequencing, and engagement tracking, making it ideal for teams that want to automate top-of-funnel pipeline generation.
integrations:
{
        platform: "MCP",
        url: "https://github.com/apollo-io/mcp-server",
        label: "Community MCP Server",
        mcpConfig: '{\n  "mcpServers": {\n    "apollo": {\n      "command": "npx",\n      "args": ["-y", "@apollo/mcp-server"

name: Clay
oneLiner: Creative data enrichment and outbound automation platform.
description: Clay's REST API lets you programmatically run waterfall enrichment across 100+ data providers, build dynamic lead lists, and orchestrate personalized outbound campaigns. It acts as a universal connector between data sources so you can enrich any prospect record with firmographic, technographic, and intent signals. Clay is a go-to tool for revenue teams building highly targeted, data-driven outreach at scale.
aiCapabilities: ["Waterfall Enrichment", "AI-Powered Outbound", "Universal Data Connector"]
starterPrompt: Claude, use Clay to enrich this list of domains with their latest funding round and LinkedIn URL.

name: Prospeo
oneLiner: Email finder and verification API for sales prospecting.
description: Prospeo offers a straightforward REST API for finding and verifying professional email addresses at scale. Use the email finder to locate contacts by name and domain, run bulk verification to clean your lists, and extract emails from LinkedIn profiles. Prospeo is designed for lean sales teams and developers who need reliable email discovery without the overhead of a full-suite platform.
aiCapabilities: ["Email Finding", "Email Verification", "LinkedIn Data Extraction"]
starterPrompt: Claude, find the professional email for the CEO of Stripe using Prospeo.

name: Inbox
oneLiner: The unified API and MCP server for managing X (Twitter) DMs.
description: Inbox provides a programmatic way to send and manage DM conversations across messaging platforms, starting with X. It offers a REST API for message automation, CRM synchronization, and AI-powered responses. With its native MCP server, you can connect tools like Claude or Cursor directly to your Twitter DMs to automate outreach and support workflows.

name: Intellizence
oneLiner: AI-powered company intelligence and business signal API.
description: Intellizence provides a powerful API for tracking critical business signals like M&A deals, startup funding, layoffs, and C-suite changes. It enables sales and investment teams to programmatically monitor their target accounts for 'intent' triggers. With deep coverage of company news and structured data on venture capital deals, Intellizence is a key tool for building automated, signal-based outbound workflows.
aiCapabilities: ["M&A Signal Tracking", "Funding Deal Alerts", "Layoff & Hiring Intelligence", "C-Suite Change Monitoring"]
starterPrompt: Claude, use Intellizence to find any recent Series B funding rounds for SaaS companies in New York.

name: Jebbit
oneLiner: Interactive quiz platform for capturing zero-party consumer data.
description: Jebbit's REST API allows developers to programmatically manage interactive quizzes, product feeds, and lead capture workflows. It specializes in 'zero-party data'—data that customers intentionally share with a brand. By integrating Jebbit into your sales stack, you can sync high-intent lead data directly to your CRM and trigger personalized follow-ups based on quiz responses.
aiCapabilities: ["Zero-Party Data Collection", "Automated Quiz Management", "Dynamic Lead Scoring"]
starterPrompt: Claude, use the Jebbit API to fetch the latest quiz results for my 'Product Matcher' campaign and summarize the top preferences.

name: Journy.io
oneLiner: Customer intelligence and product-led growth (PLG) platform.
description: Journy.io provides a robust REST API for syncing customer behavior data, product usage, and lead scores across your sales and marketing stack. It helps revenue teams identify 'Product Qualified Leads' (PQLs) by analyzing how users interact with their application. With its automation engine, you can trigger personalized outreach in your CRM or messaging tools based on real-time user intent signals.
aiCapabilities: ["Lead Scoring", "User Intent Analysis", "Automated PQL Identification"]
starterPrompt: Claude, use Journy.io to find users who have performed more than 5 key actions in the last 24 hours and score them for outreach.

name: Journey.io
oneLiner: Interactive sales rooms and buyer engagement platform.
description: Journey.io's API enables developers to programmatically create and manage interactive sales 'journeys'—customizable landing pages that house all your sales materials, videos, and documents. By tracking how buyers interact with these journeys, sales teams get granular insights into deal progress. The API allows for automated journey creation upon lead signup, ensuring a personalized buyer experience at scale.
aiCapabilities: ["Automated Sales Room Creation", "Buyer Intent Tracking", "Personalized Content Orchestration"]
starterPrompt: Claude, create a new Journey.io room for 'Acme Corp' and add the latest case study and pricing PDF.

name: JustCall
oneLiner: Cloud phone system for sales and support teams with deep CRM integrations.
description: JustCall's REST API allows developers to programmatically initiate calls, send SMS/MMS, and retrieve call recordings and analytics. It is designed for sales teams that want to build custom dialers or automate voice-based workflows within their CRM. With its robust webhook support, you can trigger actions in real-time when a call is started, answered, or completed, making it a cornerstone for automated sales operations.
aiCapabilities: ["Automated Voice Dialing", "SMS Campaign Automation", "Call Analytics Retrieval"]
starterPrompt: Claude, use JustCall to send an SMS to this list of prospects asking if they'd like to book a demo.

name: Kaspr
oneLiner: LinkedIn-first B2B contact data retrieval and prospecting tool.
description: Kaspr provides a developer API that allows programmatic access to its massive database of business and contact information. Developers can retrieve verified names, email addresses, and phone numbers directly from LinkedIn profiles. The API is designed for building custom prospecting workflows and keeping your CRM data up-to-date with high-accuracy contact details.
aiCapabilities: ["LinkedIn Data Extraction", "B2B Contact Retrieval", "CRM Data Enrichment"]
starterPrompt: Claude, use Kaspr to find the contact info for the VP of Sales at any company I provide a LinkedIn URL for.

name: Katalyz
oneLiner: Collaborative digital sales rooms for B2B engagement.
description: Katalyz enables sales teams to create shared, digital spaces where they can collaborate with prospects and customers. The platform's API allows for automated creation of sales rooms directly from CRM triggers, ensuring that every new lead or opportunity gets a personalized, collaborative portal. It tracks engagement within the room, providing sales reps with real-time insights into buyer intent and deal momentum.
aiCapabilities: ["Automated Sales Room Orchestration", "Buyer Engagement Tracking", "CRM Triggered Workflows"]
starterPrompt: Claude, create a Katalyz sales room for my new deal with 'Future Tech' and include the proposal and demo video.

name: Kixie
oneLiner: AI-powered sales dialer and SMS platform for high-velocity teams.
description: Kixie offers a robust API for automating voice and SMS communication within your sales stack. It features AI-powered dialing, local presence, and deep CRM integrations that can be orchestrated programmatically. Developers can use the API to trigger calls, send personalized SMS campaigns, and sync call logs and recordings directly into their business systems, significantly boosting rep productivity.
aiCapabilities: ["AI Parallel Dialing", "Automated SMS Outreach", "Intelligent Call Routing"]
starterPrompt: Claude, start a Kixie campaign to dial the 50 leads from my 'Hot Leads' list and leave a pre-recorded voicemail if they don't answer.

name: Kaspr
oneLiner: LinkedIn-first B2B contact data retrieval and prospecting tool.
description: Kaspr provides a developer API that allows programmatic access to its massive database of business and contact information. Developers can retrieve verified names, email addresses, and phone numbers directly from LinkedIn profiles. The API is designed for building custom prospecting workflows and keeping your CRM data up-to-date with high-accuracy contact details.
aiCapabilities: ["Enrich LinkedIn Leads", "Retrieve Verified Emails", "Find Mobile Numbers"]
starterPrompt: Claude, use Kaspr to find the mobile phone number for this LinkedIn profile URL.

name: Cognism
oneLiner: Global B2B sales intelligence with premium mobile data.
description: Cognism offers a robust API for searching, previewing, and enriching contact and account data from its globally compliant database. It is especially strong in European markets and provides 'Diamond Data'—phone-verified mobile numbers. The API supports deep enrichment and intent-based prospecting, allowing developers to build sophisticated outbound systems that target the right buyers at the right time.
aiCapabilities: ["Global Data Enrichment", "Intent-Based Prospecting", "Verified Mobile Data"]
starterPrompt: Claude, search Cognism for companies in the UK using Salesforce and get their VP of Sales contact info.

name: Crawl4AI
oneLiner: Open-source LLM-friendly web crawler and scraper.
description: Crawl4AI is an open-source Python library designed to crawl websites and convert them into clean, structured Markdown for Large Language Models. It features stealth mode to avoid bot detection, session management for complex workflows, and the ability to extract structured data using LLMs. It is a favorite among AI-native operators for 'automated website verification' and researching thousands of company pages at once.

name: Firecrawl
oneLiner: Turn any website into LLM-ready Markdown or structured JSON.
description: Firecrawl is an API-first service that crawls and scrapes websites, handling complex tasks like JavaScript rendering and bot detection automatically. It is designed to deliver perfectly formatted Markdown or JSON for AI agents and RAG systems. With 'Zero-Selector Extraction', you can use natural language to specify what data you want to extract, making it a favorite for AI-native operators building dynamic directories.

name: Outscraper
oneLiner: Extract high-quality business data from Google Maps and beyond.
description: Outscraper provides a powerful API for scraping business listings, reviews, and contact details from Google Maps, Amazon, and other public sources. It is widely used for building niche directories (as seen in the Frey Chu workflow) to gather initial seed data for local businesses or specialized industries. The API handles proxies and scaling, providing clean CSV or JSON outputs ready for AI enrichment.
aiCapabilities: ["Bulk Business Scraping", "Google Maps Enrichment", "Review Analysis"]
starterPrompt: Claude, use Outscraper to find the top 50 restaurants in Brooklyn with their website and phone number.

name: Hunter.io
oneLiner: The standard for finding and verifying professional email addresses.
description: Hunter.io provides a robust REST API for domain search, email finding, and email verification. It is a core tool for prospecting, allowing AI agents to find the right contacts at any company just by their domain. Hunter also offers an official MCP server, enabling AI assistants to perform real-time contact discovery and verification via chat.

name: Lusha
oneLiner: Real-time B2B contact and company intelligence API.
description: Lusha provides a RESTful API that delivers verified contact details and company firmographics. It is highly effective for enriching lead lists and providing AI agents with direct dials and personal emails for decision-makers. The Lusha API is built for speed and high-intent prospecting, ensuring that sales teams have the most accurate data at their fingertips.
aiCapabilities: ["Direct Dial Enrichment", "Firmographic Data Retrieval", "Real-time Prospecting"]
starterPrompt: Claude, enrich this list of LinkedIn URLs with Lusha to find their direct phone numbers.

name: Exa.ai
oneLiner: AI-native search engine for finding anything on the web.
description: Exa (formerly Metaphor) is a search engine built from the ground up for LLMs. Its API allows AI agents to search the web using natural language and receive high-quality, structured results. Exa is exceptionally good at finding niche companies, blog posts, and research papers that traditional search engines miss. Its official MCP server makes it a primary tool for AI-led market research and prospecting.

name: Tavily AI
oneLiner: Search engine optimized for AI agents and RAG applications.
description: Tavily is a search engine designed specifically for AI agents to conduct real-time research with high accuracy. Its API provides clean, filtered results that are perfect for LLM context windows. With its official MCP server, AI assistants can seamlessly search the web and extract content from pages, making it an essential tool for automated market analysis and lead enrichment.

name: Perplexity AI
oneLiner: AI-powered research engine with a robust search and agent API.
description: Perplexity provides an API that allows developers to integrate its powerful research and search capabilities into their own products. It offers the 'Sonar' models for real-time web search and an 'Agent API' for building advanced AI researchers. For AI-native operators, Perplexity's API is a primary choice for giving agents grounded, up-to-date information from across the web.
aiCapabilities: ["Grounded Web Research", "Real-time Search API", "Agentic Responses"]
starterPrompt: Claude, use the Perplexity API to research the current competitive landscape for 'AI Video Prospecting'.

name: PhantomBuster
oneLiner: Automate lead generation and data extraction across any web platform.
description: PhantomBuster's REST API allows developers to programmatically trigger 'Phantoms' (automated scripts) for scraping LinkedIn, Twitter, Google Maps, and more. It features 'Buster' functions for solving captchas and saving results. AI agents can use the API to launch specific automation workflows, fetch results, and manage leads in organizational storage without manual intervention.
aiCapabilities: ["Launch Automated Phantoms", "Solve Captchas for Agents", "Fetch Scraped Lead Data"]
starterPrompt: Claude, launch the 'LinkedIn Profile Scraper' Phantom in PhantomBuster using this list of profile URLs.

name: A-Leads
oneLiner: Up-to-date B2B lead generation with a developer-first API.
description: A-Leads is a momentum leader in lead generation, providing a documented REST API for developers to programmatically find and export high-quality B2B contact data. It focuses on performance and accuracy for modern sales teams.
aiCapabilities: ["Lead Discovery", "Contact Export", "Data Enrichment"]
starterPrompt: Claude, use A-Leads to find 50 CEOs of SaaS startups in New York.

name: Adapt
oneLiner: Lead intelligence platform with a massive B2B contact database and API.
description: Adapt provides a robust API for lead intelligence, offering access to over 250 million contacts. It allows teams to identify growing companies through key hires and expansion signals, making it ideal for building data-driven prospecting workflows.
aiCapabilities: ["Identify Growing Companies", "Contact Enrichment", "Pipeline Filling"]
starterPrompt: Claude, search Adapt for companies that have recently hired a new VP of Sales.

name: Find Me Sales
oneLiner: Lead generation and outreach with built-in AI summaries and webhook support.
description: Find Me Sales is a lead generation platform that provides precision-targeted contact data. It features AI-powered summaries and provides webhooks and Zapier integrations to push lead data directly into your existing sales stack, making it easy to automate the top of your funnel.
aiCapabilities: ["Lead Precision Matching", "AI Prospect Summaries", "Webhook Data Pushing"]
starterPrompt: Claude, find 50 leads in the logistics industry using Find Me Sales and push them to my CRM via webhook.

name: Snov.io
oneLiner: Email finder, verifier, and cold outreach automation platform.
description: Snov.io provides a robust REST API for finding and verifying email addresses, managing prospect lists, and automating cold outreach. It is a favorite for sales teams looking to build scalable, automated top-of-funnel workflows with high deliverability.
aiCapabilities: ["Email Discovery", "Lead Verification", "Outreach Automation"]
starterPrompt: Claude, find the verified email for the CTO of Acme Corp using Snov.io.

name: Mattermark
oneLiner: Data-driven company insights and lead intelligence platform.
description: Mattermark offers both REST and GraphQL APIs to access detailed data on millions of companies and investors. It allows developers to build custom scoring models, enrich CRM data, and identify high-growth prospects programmatically.
aiCapabilities: ["Company Growth Tracking", "CRM Enrichment", "Custom Lead Scoring"]
starterPrompt: Claude, use Mattermark to find companies in the AI space that have raised a Series A in the last 6 months.

name: Kuration
oneLiner: Enriched prospect databases and data-as-a-service.
description: Kuration provides enriched prospect databases sourced from events, directories, and public records. It offers an API for developers to programmatically access its curated data, making it easier to build high-intent lead lists for specific niche industries.
aiCapabilities: ["Niche Lead Sourcing", "Data Enrichment", "Custom Prospect Databases"]
starterPrompt: Claude, fetch 100 leads from the latest tech event using the Kuration API.

name: Instantly.ai
oneLiner: Cold email infrastructure and outreach automation at scale.
description: Instantly.ai provides a REST API for managing cold email campaigns, warming up inboxes, and tracking deliverability metrics programmatically. Developers can create and schedule multi-step email sequences, manage unlimited sending accounts, and pull analytics on open rates, replies, and bounces. It is built for agencies and sales teams that need to scale outbound email without sacrificing deliverability.
aiCapabilities: ["Automate Cold Email", "Inbox Warmup", "Campaign Analytics"]
starterPrompt: Claude, create a new cold email campaign in Instantly for the lead list I just generated.

name: Resend
oneLiner: Modern email API built for developers.
description: Resend is a developer-first email API that makes sending transactional and marketing emails simple and reliable. The REST API supports sending emails with React components as templates, domain verification, audience management, and detailed delivery analytics. With SDKs for Python, Node.js, Go, and Ruby, Resend is ideal for SaaS teams that want to own their email infrastructure with minimal setup.
integrations:
{
        platform: "MCP",
        url: "https://github.com/resend/mcp-server",
        label: "Official MCP Server",
        mcpConfig: '{\n  "mcpServers": {\n    "resend": {\n      "command": "npx",\n      "args": ["-y", "@resend/mcp-server"

name: Loops
oneLiner: Email platform for modern SaaS companies.
description: Loops provides a REST API for sending transactional emails, managing contacts, and triggering event-based email campaigns. It is designed specifically for SaaS companies that need to combine marketing loops, onboarding sequences, and product emails in one platform. The API is clean and well-documented, making it easy to integrate lifecycle email into your application.
aiCapabilities: ["SaaS Lifecycle Email", "Trigger Events", "Contact Management"]
starterPrompt: Claude, trigger the 'Post-Purchase' event in Loops for customer 'akhil@example.com'.

name: lemlist
oneLiner: Sales engagement platform with advanced personalization and outreach APIs.
description: lemlist offers a developer API designed for automating multichannel outreach, building custom workflows, and enriching databases. It features 'lemlist AI' which helps with lead segmentation and personalized content generation. The API allows you to manage campaigns, trigger actions based on prospect behavior, and sync data seamlessly with your CRM, making it a powerful tool for AI-driven sales teams.
aiCapabilities: ["Personalized Multichannel Outreach", "Lead Segmentation", "Campaign Automation"]
starterPrompt: Claude, create a new lemlist campaign and add these 50 leads with personalized icebreakers.

name: Smartlead.ai
oneLiner: Scale your outbound with AI-powered cold email automation.
description: Smartlead provides a powerful REST API for automating cold email campaigns, managing master inboxes, and tracking lead statistics. It features 'Smart Prospect' for lead search and 'Smart Delivery' for deliverability optimization. The API allows AI agents to push leads to campaigns, manage sequences, and respond to replies directly from a centralized master inbox.
aiCapabilities: ["Automated Lead Pushing", "Master Inbox Management", "Campaign Sequence Control"]
starterPrompt: Claude, push these 100 leads to the 'Product Launch' campaign in Smartlead and set their category to 'Interested'.

name: Attio
oneLiner: Next-generation CRM with a powerful, flexible API.
description: Attio is a modern CRM that exposes a comprehensive REST API for managing contacts, companies, deals, and custom objects. The API supports complex filtering, real-time webhooks, and full CRUD on all data models. Attio also offers an official MCP server, making it one of the first CRMs to support the Model Context Protocol for AI-powered integrations.
integrations:
{
        platform: "MCP",
        url: "https://github.com/attio/mcp-server",
        label: "Official MCP Server",
        mcpConfig: '{\n  "mcpServers": {\n    "attio": {\n      "command": "npx",\n      "args": ["-y", "@attio/mcp-server"

name: Twenty
oneLiner: Open-source CRM with REST and GraphQL APIs.
description: Twenty is an open-source CRM that offers both REST and GraphQL APIs for full control over your customer data. Self-host it or use the cloud version to manage contacts, companies, opportunities, and custom objects. The GraphQL API provides flexible querying, while the REST API covers standard CRUD operations. As an open-source project, Twenty gives teams complete transparency and the ability to extend the platform.
aiCapabilities: ["Open-source CRM", "GraphQL & REST", "Self-hosting"]
starterPrompt: Claude, write a GraphQL query for Twenty to fetch all opportunities closing this month.

name: HubSpot
oneLiner: All-in-one CRM platform with an extensive API ecosystem.
description: HubSpot offers one of the most comprehensive CRM APIs in the market, covering contacts, companies, deals, tickets, marketing, and custom objects. The REST API supports batch operations, advanced filtering with CRM search, and real-time webhooks. With official SDKs in Python, Node.js, Ruby, and PHP, plus an MCP server for AI integrations, HubSpot is the industry standard for CRM automation and is trusted by over 200,000 businesses worldwide.
integrations:
{
        platform: "MCP",
        url: "https://github.com/hubspot/hubspot-mcp",
        label: "Official MCP Server",
        mcpConfig: '{\n  "mcpServers": {\n    "hubspot": {\n      "command": "npx",\n      "args": ["-y", "@hubspot/mcp-server"

name: Salesforce
oneLiner: The world's leading enterprise CRM with comprehensive API and AI tools.
description: Salesforce provides a massive ecosystem of APIs (REST, SOAP, Bulk) for managing every aspect of the customer journey. It has recently introduced Salesforce Hosted MCP Servers, allowing teams to expose Salesforce data as tools for AI agents. With Einstein AI and Agentforce, Salesforce is pushing the boundaries of autonomous sales operations, making it a critical hub for AI-native enterprise workflows.

name: Zoho CRM
oneLiner: Flexible CRM for growing businesses with native AI and MCP support.
description: Zoho CRM provides a powerful REST API and a specialized 'Zoho MCP' service that allows developers to create custom MCP servers for AI agents. This enables AI assistants to perform complex actions across the Zoho suite. With Zia (Zoho's AI assistant) providing sales predictions and anomaly detection, Zoho is a top choice for teams building automated, AI-augmented sales processes.

name: Pipedrive
oneLiner: Sales-focused CRM with a robust REST API for deal management.
description: Pipedrive offers a developer-friendly REST API designed to help sales teams manage their pipelines programmatically. It features high performance and a clean data structure, making it ideal for AI agents to track deals, manage activities, and update contact information. Pipedrive also has an official MCP server, facilitating natural language interaction with CRM data.

name: Folk
oneLiner: Lightweight CRM designed for relationship-driven teams.
description: Folk is a collaborative CRM with a REST API that lets you manage contacts, companies, and pipelines programmatically. The API supports creating and updating records, managing custom fields, and syncing data from external sources. Folk is built for teams that prioritize relationships over rigid sales processes, making it popular with VCs, agencies, and partnership teams.

name: ARPEDIO
oneLiner: Account-based selling platform for Salesforce.
description: ARPEDIO is a Salesforce-native application that provides a suite of tools for account-based selling, including account planning, opportunity management, org charts, and relationship mapping. It helps sales teams to better understand their customers and to identify and close more deals.
aiCapabilities: ["Account Planning", "Opportunity Management", "Relationship Mapping", "Org Charts"]
starterPrompt: Claude, show me the org chart for the Acme Corporation account in ARPEDIO.

name: ActionGrid (Conga)
oneLiner: Salesforce optimization and data management with a robust API.
description: ActionGrid, now part of Conga, provides powerful tools for Salesforce optimization and automated document generation via the Conga Composer API. It allows developers to streamline revenue management and connect Salesforce data to their wider tech stack using a single API callout.
aiCapabilities: ["Salesforce Optimization", "Automated Document Generation", "Revenue Management"]
starterPrompt: Claude, use the Conga API to generate an order form for this opportunity in Salesforce.

name: Colby AI
oneLiner: The AI Sales Analyst that updates your CRM via voice and text.
description: Colby AI acts as an autonomous sales analyst that integrates directly with Salesforce. It allows users to update CRM data using voice memos or text, bulk-create leads, and perform deep research on prospects. It requires a Salesforce tier with API access to function as your 'perfect analyst'.
aiCapabilities: ["Voice-to-CRM Updates", "Automated Lead Creation", "AI Account Research"]
starterPrompt: Claude, use Colby to update the latest meeting notes for the Stripe account in Salesforce.

name: Clearbit (Breeze)
oneLiner: Real-time company and person enrichment API by HubSpot.
description: Clearbit, now part of HubSpot as Breeze Intelligence, provides REST APIs for enriching person and company records in real time. Look up any email or domain to get firmographic data, technographics, employee counts, funding details, and more. The Enrichment API powers lead scoring, routing, and personalization for thousands of B2B companies and integrates natively with HubSpot CRM.

name: People Data Labs
oneLiner: B2B data API with 3 billion person and company records.
description: People Data Labs provides a REST API for accessing one of the largest people and company datasets available. Use the Person Enrichment, Company Enrichment, and Search APIs to build prospecting lists, enrich CRM records, and power data-driven applications. With SDKs in Python, Node.js, Go, and Ruby, PDL is designed for developers building data products and go-to-market tools at scale.

name: Proxycurl
oneLiner: API for scraping and enriching LinkedIn profile data.
description: Proxycurl provides a REST API that extracts structured data from LinkedIn profiles and company pages without requiring a LinkedIn account or dealing with rate limits. Use it to enrich leads with job titles, work history, education, skills, and company details. Proxycurl is popular among sales and recruiting teams that need reliable LinkedIn data for prospecting and research workflows.

name: Jina Reader
oneLiner: Convert any URL to LLM-friendly Markdown for AI processing.
description: Jina Reader is an API that extracts the core content from any webpage and converts it into clean Markdown. It is a critical 'Lego block' for AI-native operators who need to give their agents the ability to 'read' the web. Its official MCP server allows AI assistants to fetch and process web content in real-time for research, summarization, and data extraction.

name: Voyage AI
oneLiner: State-of-the-art embedding and reranking models for RAG.
description: Voyage AI provides specialized embedding and reranking API models that are optimized for retrieval accuracy. For AI-native operators, Voyage is a critical component for building custom 'brain' systems that can find exactly the right sales context from massive document sets or CRM histories. Their models are known for outperforming general-purpose embeddings in sales and technical domains.
aiCapabilities: ["Specialized Text Embeddings", "Document Reranking", "AI Search Optimization"]
starterPrompt: Claude, use Voyage AI to rerank these 100 search results to find the most relevant case study for this customer.

name: Argyle
oneLiner: The leading employment data platform for income and employment verification.
description: Argyle provides a robust REST API that allows developers to access real-time income and employment data directly from payroll systems. It is widely used for mortgage, lending, and sales workflows that require verified employment history and financial signals.
aiCapabilities: ["Income Verification", "Employment History Retrieval", "Real-time Financial Data"]
starterPrompt: Claude, use Argyle to verify the employment status and current income for this prospect domain.

name: Orbitly
oneLiner: Enrich your contact lists with email and social data.
description: Orbitly provides a simple API and webhook support for enriching lead lists with professional emails and social media profiles. It allows developers to automate the data appending process, ensuring that sales teams have complete context for their prospects.
aiCapabilities: ["Social Data Appending", "Email Discovery", "Webhook Data Export"]
starterPrompt: Claude, use Orbitly to enrich this list of LinkedIn URLs with their verified email addresses.

name: Bland.ai
oneLiner: AI phone calling API for sales and support automation.
description: Bland.ai provides a REST API for making and receiving AI-powered phone calls at scale. Build automated outbound calling campaigns, inbound call handling, and conversational voice agents without managing telephony infrastructure. The API supports custom voice personas, call transfers, and real-time transcription, making it ideal for sales teams looking to automate qualification calls and appointment setting.

name: Vapi
oneLiner: Developer platform for building voice AI agents.
description: Vapi is a developer-first platform with a REST API for building, testing, and deploying voice AI agents. Create custom voice assistants that can make and receive phone calls, handle complex conversations, and integrate with your existing tools. Vapi supports multiple LLM providers, custom voices, function calling, and real-time streaming, giving developers full control over the voice AI experience.

name: Retell AI
oneLiner: The platform for building high-performance conversational AI voice agents.
description: Retell AI provides a comprehensive REST API and SDK for creating, managing, and deploying AI voice agents that can make and receive phone calls. It features a 'Retell LLM Response Engine' and supports complex conversation flows. For AI-native operators, it offers an 'MCP Tool' capability, making it exceptionally easy to integrate voice interactions into agentic workflows.

name: ElevenLabs
oneLiner: Advanced AI audio platform for realistic text-to-speech and voice agents.
description: ElevenLabs offers a developer API for generating high-quality AI voices, dubbing, and text-to-speech. Its new 'ElevenAgents' platform allows developers to build conversational voice assistants with low latency. For AI-native operators, ElevenLabs is the gold standard for creating personalized voice outreach and automating customer calls with human-like sound.

name: Cal.com
oneLiner: Open-source scheduling infrastructure with a full API.
description: Cal.com is the open-source alternative to Calendly, offering a REST API for managing event types, bookings, availability, and users programmatically. Embed scheduling into your product, sync calendars, and automate booking workflows. As an open-source project, Cal.com gives you full control over your scheduling infrastructure, with options to self-host or use the managed cloud platform.

name: Calendly
oneLiner: Scheduling automation platform with a robust API.
description: Calendly's REST API allows developers to manage event types, list scheduled events, handle invitee data, and subscribe to real-time webhooks for booking notifications. Integrate Calendly into your sales workflow to automate meeting scheduling, route leads to the right reps, and sync booking data with your CRM. Calendly is the most widely adopted scheduling tool for sales and customer-facing teams.

name: Chili Piper
oneLiner: Advanced scheduling and routing API for revenue teams.
description: Chili Piper provides a powerful API for automating complex booking and routing workflows.
